title: DaemonStatusReport
description: Daemon status report for querying daemon health from JS or CLI.

binaryPath.description: Absolute path to the daemon binary.

configChangePending.description: Whether a config-level change is pending that requires full rebuild.

generation.description: Current generation (rebuild counter) of the index.

graphEdges.description: Number of edges in the module graph.

graphNodes.description: Number of nodes in the module graph.

incrementalRebuilds.description: Number of incremental rebuilds since daemon start.

indexWarm.description: Whether the hot index has been warmed (initial build complete).

initialBuildMs.description: Milliseconds the initial graph build took.

lastRebuildMs.description: Milliseconds the last incremental rebuild took.

lastUpdateMs.description: Milliseconds since the last graph update.

pid.description: Process ID of the running daemon, if any.

port.description: TCP port the daemon is listening on, if any.

projectRoot.description: Absolute path to the project root the daemon is serving.

running.description: Whether a daemon process is currently running.

startedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the daemon started.

totalInvalidations.description: Total number of files invalidated since daemon start.

uptimeSecs.description: Uptime of the daemon in seconds.

version.description: Version of the running daemon binary.

watchedFiles.description: Number of files being watched for changes.

watcherLagMs.description: Milliseconds of watcher lag (time since last fs event was processed).
